markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard William Leborgne to GrowthX's new structure and core process.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Structure:** Directors are now a pooled resource for high-level strategy, supporting Engagement Managers (EMs) who own client relationships. William's role is a Director.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [**Core Process:** The "Strategy Sprint" is an 8-week, \~$20k engagement that acts as a paid pilot, validating client fit and calibrating content quality before a long-term contract.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
  - [**Strategic Focus:** William will support Strategy Sprints, addressing a capacity bottleneck. A key project is defining clear exit criteria for the sprint to ensure successful partnerships.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
  - [**Product Vision:** The long-term goal is a hybrid SaaS model where GrowthX performs the initial high-touch setup in Atlas, then hands the platform to the client for self-serve use.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=2450.0)

## Topics

### Company Context & Reorg

  - [**Problem:** The previous structure spread Director expertise too thin across multiple accounts, limiting strategic impact and causing team burnout.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new model separates roles to maximize impact:](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
      - [**Engagement Managers (EMs):** Own client relationships, project management, and weekly calls.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
      - [**Directors (Pooled Resource):** Provide high-level strategy on demand via a Linear ticketing system.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
      - [**Content Managers:** Generate content end-to-end in Atlas, including edits.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)

### William's Role & Strategic Focus

  - [**Primary Focus:** Support the Strategy Sprint process, addressing a capacity bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
  - [**Key Project:** Define clear exit criteria for the 8-week sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [**Goal:** Ensure clients are a good long-term fit and that GrowthX can deliver value before graduating them to a full contract.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This formalizes the sprint's function as a mutual opt-in/opt-out period.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=1924.0)

### The Strategy Sprint Process

  - [**Function:** A paid, 8-week engagement (\~$20k avg) that acts as a mutual pilot to validate client fit and calibrate content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
  - [**Phase 1: Kickoff & Discovery (Weeks 1–4)**](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=2086.0)
      - [A 1-hour kickoff call uses 13 deep questions to assess client goals, ICP knowledge, and stakeholder buy-in.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=2086.0)
      - [**Deliverables:**](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=2731.0)
          - [**Artifacts:** Personas, customer stories, and product deep-dives created in Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=3328.0)
          - [**Content OS:** An Airtable presenting a full content strategy (competitive analysis, keywords, clusters) for client approval.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=2811.0)
          - [**Calibration Article:** A test piece generated in Atlas to align on voice, tone, and style.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=3236.0)
  - [**Phase 2: Production Ramp-Up (Weeks 5–8)**](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=3236.0)
      - [After calibration, the team ramps up to the contract's weekly publishing cadence (e.g., 5 articles/week).](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=3236.0)
      - [**Outcome:** A successful sprint leads to a long-term contract; an unsuccessful one allows either party to walk away.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=3210.0)

### Atlas Platform & SaaS Vision

  - [**Atlas:** GrowthX's proprietary platform, built to fix pain points experienced with tools like AeroOps.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=2545.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=3328.0)
      - [**Granular Context:** Stores detailed client artifacts (personas, product info) to ensure high-quality, on-brand content.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=3328.0)
      - [**Agentic Workflows:** Uses multi-step pipelines (e.g., Research, Brief Generation) where agents create and execute their own success criteria.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=3420.0)
  - [**SaaS Vision:** Transition to a hybrid model by Jan/Feb.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=2450.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX performs the initial high-touch setup (kickoff, artifacts, strategy) in Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=2485.0)
      - [**Outcome:** The client then takes over for self-serve content generation.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=2589.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**George:**](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=3643.0)
      - [Share Strategy Sprint Notion page and Fathom recordings of kickoff calls.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=2014.0)
      - [Grant William access to Airtable and the ME onboarding system in Linear.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=2840.0)
      - [Schedule a recurring weekly 1:1.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=3875.0)
  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=3668.0)
      - [Review all shared resources.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=3643.0)
      - [Complete the ME onboarding system in Linear.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
      - [Begin daily journaling of the onboarding process.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
      - [Prepare for an intensive in-person week in SF next week.](https://fathom.video/share/zvuHsyF3smQeK1yLtbGK8qV9WzKAA4vg?tab=summary&timestamp=3680.0)
